description: Grandfathered source files above their surface's nonblank-LOC cap (frontend: src/**.{ts,vue}; rust: src-tauri/**/src/**.rs — higher cap because unit tests live inline). Entries may shrink but not grow; new files above the cap are rejected. Regenerate with `npm run check:loc -- --update`.

src-tauri/src/capture_commands.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched. 1211->1215: rename retarget on transcript-sidecar moves (Codex PR #46 round 4). 1215->1219: set_capture_config must also preserve the per-vault lists settings object (defaultList/listOrder, the tasks_folder preservation rule extended) — two fields + the invariant comment.

src-tauri/src/transcription.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched.

src-tauri/capture/src/session.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched.

src-tauri/core/src/vault_config.rs.reason: Split out of capture_config for the RecordingMode/VaultCaptureConfig types. Crossed the 800 cap when two independent increments both added per-vault fields to the single VaultCaptureConfig entry (struct + Default + vault_entry parse + serialize_vault_entry + round-trip/defensive-parse tests for each): this branch's Task ID settings (task_id_enabled/task_id_property + task_id_property_name resolver, PR #59) and main's document_extract_images toggle (PR #60), merged together. 834->876: the list-lifecycle increment adds a third per-vault field, archivedLists (Vec<String>, read-lenient/write-omit-when-empty, the list_order precedent) — struct field + Default + parse + serialize + a defensive-parse test + the full round-trip test construct. The large inline test module dominates the file; extracting it (or the parse/serialize pair) into a sibling is the next split. Shrink only; split when next touched.

src-tauri/core/src/capture_paths.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched. 835->854: +capture_dir (flat/dated recording-layout helper, beside dated_folder) + its test; splitting this file is disproportionate for the addition.

src-tauri/transcribe/src/model.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched.

src/stores/capture.ts.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched.

src/components/Tasks.vue.reason: The Tasks view (the codebase's churn hotspot per fallow) crossed the 500 cap under a run of Codex PR #53 re-review guards — the empty-list visibility fix (hasDisplayableLists + the buckets/empty-state split) and the Lists-grouping filter no-match fix (filterActive gating includeEmpty). It is already split into useTaskActions/useTaskLists/useTaskReorder composables + the taskSort/taskSections/taskOrder utils; extracting the grouping/display-state (buckets + its helpers) into a composable is the next split. 505->515: the Lists-view "New list" discoverability control (Task 8) — pass-through `is-aggregate`/`creating-list` props, the `@create-list` binding, and the thin `onControlsCreateList` handler + its invariant comment on TaskViewControls' props/emit shape. 515->520: the New-list control now keeps its draft on a failed create (Codex PR #59) — a controlsListResetNonce ref bumped only when createList succeeds + the success-gated onControlsCreateList that reads the result. Shrink only; split when next touched. 520->524: persist the grouping choice per view (Task 5) — loadGrouping-seeded ref + a save watch + the import. 524->525: reorderView now also requires !isAggregate.value (Task 6, GAP-63) — order ranks are per-vault numbers, so the aggregate view must never show a drag grip that would write a meaningless cross-vault rank. 525->527: archived-list filtering (Task 8) — `archivedLists` destructured from useTaskLists and threaded into the Lists-grouping `listSections` call so an archived section and its tasks hide; `listsForVault` renamed to `listsForEditor` at its sole call site here (LOC-neutral) so the inline editor's picker still shows a task's own archived list instead of blanking it. 527->586: the Lists-view section menu (Task 9) — TaskSectionMenu render in the restructured header, the rename/archive/delete destructure + wiring, and the per-list section-action runner (sectionBusy guard, sectionMenuResetNonce, the GAP-64 delete-always-reloads reloadTasks helper, and the archive-clears-default guard). 586->641: drag a task between list sections (Task 11) — the `sectionAt` pointer hit-tester (over the rendered `[data-section-key]` wrappers), `commitReorder`'s move-vs-reorder dispatch (target list via the pure `dropTargetList` helper in taskSections), the optimistic-with-revert `moveTaskToList` (jumps the row to the dropped section, adopts the landed possibly-suffixed path, reverts + toasts on failure), and the `:data-section-key` binding. The buckets/display-state AND the reorder-commit cluster (writeSingleRank/materializeRanks/moveTaskToList/commitReorder) split into a composable is now overdue — flagged for the Task 12 docs/debt pass. 641->648: polish pass — a cross-list drag now highlights the target section and drops the origin's misleading drop line; the decision logic is the pure, unit-tested crossListDropTargetKey in taskSections (so the component holds only a one-line computed + two template bindings). 648->555 (RATCHET DOWN): the reorder-commit cluster (writeSingleRank / materializeRanks / moveTaskToList / commitReorder + the `reordering` guard) was extracted into the new useTaskReorderCommit composable, and grouping/buckets moved up to feed it — a pure refactor, behavior-preserving (the reorder/move test suite is unchanged and green). The remaining split candidate is the buckets/display-state group; the view is no longer over the historical 641 mark.
